arts.ttl: ‘Doesn’t even want to hear it’ – Fingers in ears for player on Arsenal plan to sign him
arts.sum: Over the past few days, the UK press has seemed sure about Arsenal’s interest in Sporting striker Viktor Gyokeres. While the links do seem genuine, the Portuguese press has been quite ahead of the curve on all of that, insistent on Arsenal interest for months.
